price: Nun schlich er sich zu ihren Göttern und sagte: Wollt ihr nicht essen?
arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمۡ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: farāgha ilā ālihatihim faqāla alā takulūna
